name: gemma4-26b-a4b-qat
notes: Gemma 4 26B-A4B QAT is a quantization-aware-trained MoE profile. Use the exact model id reported by the serving API; InferenceBridge reports gemma-4-26B-A4B-it-QAT-Q4_0.gguf for the local LM Studio community artifact. On a 24GB RTX 3090, use a snappy 49,152-token context by default, with vision-ready mmproj/runtime status and an embedded Gemma 4 Jinja template that supports tools. Keep MTP disabled unless the selected artifact/path explicitly includes an MTP drafter.
